mapper.select: SELECT d.primary_emotion AS code, et.label_ko AS label_ko, NULL AS label, COUNT(*)::int AS cnt FROM diaries d JOIN emotion_types et ON et.code = d.primary_emotion WHERE d.user_id = #{userId} AND d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.analysis_status <> 'DRAFT' AND d.written_date >= #{monthStart} AND d.written_date < #{nextMonth} AND d.primary_emotion IS NOT NULL GROUP BY d.primary_emotion, et.label_ko UNION ALL SELECT NULL AS code, NULL AS label_ko, d.emotion_label AS label, COUNT(*)::int AS cnt FROM diaries d WHERE d.user_id = #{userId} AND d.deleted_at IS NULL AND d.analysis_status <> 'DRAFT' AND d.written_date >= #{monthStart} AND d.written_date < #{nextMonth} AND d.emotion_label IS NOT NULL GROUP BY d.emotion_label ORDER BY cnt DESC
